svg.title: Smart dustbin end-to-end data flow
svg.desc: Data flow from PIR detection through STM32, ESP32-CAM, waste classification, bin operation, fill measurement, and cloud reporting

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does PIR trigger the detection sequence?')
sendPrompt('How does STM32 confirm a real user vs a false trigger?')
sendPrompt('What happens if the user is too far away?')
sendPrompt('What does ESP32-CAM do when it receives PIR_DETECT?')
sendPrompt('How does the waste classification work on ESP32-CAM?')
sendPrompt('How does the edge platform classify waste type?')
sendPrompt('How does ESP32-CAM tell STM32 which bin to open?')
sendPrompt('How does the servo open and close sequence work?')
sendPrompt('How long does the bin stay open?')
sendPrompt('How is the fill percentage calculated from ultrasonic distance?')
sendPrompt('How is fill percentage computed from raw distance?')
sendPrompt('What format is the fill message sent in?')
sendPrompt('What JSON payload is sent to the edge platform?')
sendPrompt('What happens on a 3 second timeout waiting for ESP32?')
